title: Create: Armor Blocks
body:
Credit to Aycer for helping with code significantly!

# The armor types:

**Armor block:**

Normal armor. Ideal for armored vehicles, ships. Balanced strength and weight

**Light plating:**

Lightweight, thin armor. Ideal for aircraft. Weak but light

**Heavy armor block:**

Heavy and powerful. Ideal for frontal tank armor. Strongest but very heavy.

**Other:**

Sand bags, mostly decorative.

Tank obstacles, high hitbox makes tanks hard to cross

Armored trapdoor & Armored glass



# TO-DO:
Varied texture brightness, like raw crimsite, every block has a different brightness. Will make flat repetitive textures have more detail and depth.
Armored vs2 wings/flaps.
Fuel vs2 wings/flaps.
Reinforced concrete. Stronger than heavy armor but breaks in vs2 craft. Ideal for ground defense.
More colors + useless ones removed.
